{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016521319610024F0CCCD86DD2A"}"},"total":10302},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7175845366612067075","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的非常不错，强烈推荐，除了更新量如果能更大点的话就更加完美了，总体来说结构比较严谨，剧情一层一层环环相扣，有一点甜甜恋爱的代入感，希望作者大大继续保持！！！强力推荐！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670756822,"group_id":"7158463233492257827","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxFgHwWm/Yh7T771ZflefddfBrEKJz5ucqvLweUmRkZM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/21eda50262c04ea6826346b4224f9aa1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533997&x-signature=jK51QGrPKBzzcBBuhfDnsLt3dRI%3D","user_id":"3562043115839086","user_name":"0366酥橙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3562043115839086","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7158463233492257827","book_info":{"abstract":"【游戏制作】【单女主】【狗粮】【文娱】
　　池闻：我们这次的游戏呢，虽然有恐怖元素在内，但是呢……
　　玩家：不买不买，你们的恐怖游戏我绝对不会再碰的！
　　池闻：哦？但是可以种田和基建哦。
　　玩家：OK，买了。
　　拥有系统在身的池闻意外的成为了一家空壳游戏公司的项目经理。
　　借此机会，池闻利用系统，将自己送上了华夏游戏之王的巅峰宝座。
　　在这之间，一部手机里遗留的神秘微信联系人，也让他收获一段神奇的爱情。
　　……
　　狗粮版简介：
　　网友惋惜：池闻长的帅，不缺钱，写代码做游戏也是一把好手，为什么就是没对象呢？
　　池闻笑而不语。
　　当他和当红影后的恋情被爆出来后。
　　网友咬牙：你是真该死啊！看你这家伙跟沈影后谈恋爱，简直比杀了我还要难受！
　　……
　　涉及游戏：《Inside》《森林》《逃生》《掘地求升》《分手厨房》《动物园之星》
　　《骑马与砍杀》《刺客信条》《神秘海域》《赛博朋克2077》《巫师》等等等等……
　　ps：影后比男主大，所以是姐弟恋，介意勿入。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fdd562ea24087b9cdf395761021fb150","author":"生椰啦铁","author_id":"","book_id":"7158463233492257827","book_name":"我游戏教父，跟影后恋爱很正常吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#504838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7158657979506655756","read_count":"42067","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1112935"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"537","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,单女主,1v1,魂穿,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8fb72eb9f2c59e0fa2e907b02858b70e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180733&x-signature=bOHBNnwU5AVBTiWJySEoAfM7axw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"b
